features: DUZZIT POWER DESCALER: Keep your large home appliances hygienically clean, limescale build up over time, particularly in hard water areas can affect the performance and damage the heating element shortening the working life of them

100 PercentREMOVAL : Heated water breaks down creating solid limescale , build up can cause problems, removing limescale improves appliance performance. Treatment formulated to remove 100 Percentlimescale

PERFECTLY CLEAN: Duzzit Power Descaler is a treatment designed to clean by eliminating detergent and limescale build up on. Removing limescale build up will help to maintain your large home appliances whilst leaving them fresh and perfectly clean. Recommended to use every 3 months
SAFE & FAST: Easy to use sachets that work in quickly. Safe to use in all washing machines and dishwashers
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Pack of 1 single-use sachet
description: Product Description Duzzit Power Descaler is a treatment designed to clean by eliminating detergent and limescale build up on. Removing limescale build up will help to maintain your large home appliances whilst leaving them fresh and perfectly clean. Recommended to use every 3 months.
